Legacy Starts Here

More than a cart. A reason to get out and ride.

Legacy Cart Co. was built around family, hard work, and the idea that the best memories are made together. We help customers find, refresh, and upgrade golf carts they can enjoy for years.

Tell us what you have.

Send the year, make, model, condition, and a few photos. We’ll review it and get back to you.

Our Story

A family business with a name that means something.

Legacy Cart Co. is based in Greenwood, Indiana. The business was created to build something meaningful, spend time together, and help local families enjoy the golf cart lifestyle without the usual sales pressure.

Every cart we sell and every upgrade we install carries our name. That means honest answers, careful work, and treating customers the way we would want our own family treated.

Ready to Ride?

Let’s find the right cart for you.
